summary: Fix verified: listDir fallback enables directory scan in production. 1287 tests pass, 2 pre-existing envoy infra failures. TypeScript clean. Biome clean.

criteriaResults.evidence: server.ts:506 uses opts.repoManagerDeps?.listDir ?? defaultRepoManagerDeps.listDir — when repoManagerDeps is not injected, defaultRepoManagerDeps.listDir (readdir-based) is used, enabling directory scan in production
removeDir(workspacePath, opts.repoManagerDeps) at server.ts:527 — when opts.repoManagerDeps is undefined, removeDir defaults to defaultDeps.rmDir (real filesystem rmDir)
defaultDeps exported as defaultRepoManagerDeps from repo-manager.ts — TypeScript type check clean, no import errors
